title: Kyle
html:
Kyle

Recurring 2024 Corvallis roommate. Always paired with ayden in the rent / Venmo / internet-bill ledger — the Kyle+Ayden dyad is Yahir's domestic operating context for the OSU mid-junior → senior bridge while he was pivoting toward Shanghai and then Austin.

Relational role

Kyle's role across the corpus is logistical, not emotional: he doesn't surface in confidant or conflict mode, only in operational mode — Venmo transfers, room decisions for next year, internet bill splits. That itself is the data: Kyle is the "low-friction roommate" archetype, the kind of housemate Yahir keeps in the rotation precisely because the relationship requires no maintenance.

Appearances

  • 2024 05 13 things — "Rent transfers to Kyle / Ayden (Venmo internet bill split)" + "Decide on rooms for next year"
  • 2024 02 15 thoughts and things 2142024 — early-2024 mention
  • 2024 02 24 Thoughts and Things 2242024
  • 2024 03 02 Thoughts and Things on 3224
  • 2024 05 13 things pre asia trip — pre-departure handoff
  • 2024 05 07 things ending with sam — same-week as the Sam arc collapse
  • 2025 06 22 wedding list for now — invited (so the relationship persisted past the OSU exit)
  • 2025 08 22 camping list roommate split — still splitting expenses with him a year later
  • 2026 04 04 im drowning a bit — name still in the loop in 2026

Connections
